command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
JOB="job-20260625T141723Z-abe6d29f"
BASE="/home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/jobs/$JOB"

echo "=== VALIDATION.JSON ==="
cat $BASE/validation.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print(json.dumps(d,indent=2)[:3000])
" 2>/dev/null || cat $BASE/validation.json | head -60

echo "=== CANDIDATE.PATCH ==="
head -40 $BASE/candidate.patch 2>/dev/null || echo "no patch"

echo "=== JOB DIR FILES ==="
ls -la $BASE/

echo "=== RUNNER LOG ==="
cat /home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator/logs/$JOB.runner.log | head -30 || echo "empty"
' 2>&1
echo DONE_1981
